---
title: "Resume"
---

## Vianey Villegas 

<iframe src="resume.pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>

El Monte, CA\
Email: vianey3146\@gmail.com\
Phone: (626) 409-3146

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Education

**California State Polytechnic University, Pomona**\
Bachelor of Science in Business Administration, Marketing Management\
Expected Graduation: May, 2027

**Rio Hondo College**\
Associate of Science in Business Administration\
Associate of Arts in Social Sciences\
Associate of Science in Science & Mathematics\
Graduated: May, 2025

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Professional Experience

### Supervisor & Barista

**Tierra Mia – El Monte, CA**\
June 2024 – April, 2026

-   Supervise daily operations and improve workflow efficiency\
-   Manage cash handling and opening procedures\
-   Resolve customer concerns in a professional manner\
-   Train new employees on customer service and bar operations

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Management / Business Owner

**Vvaullt – El Monte, CA**\
January 2025 – Present

-   Founded and manage a resale and coffee business\
-   Analyze sales performance to adjust pricing and product strategy\
-   Develop and manage social media marketing content\
-   Handle customer communication, orders, and shipping

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Student Assistant

**Rio Hondo Financial Aid Office – Whittier, CA**\
Feb 2023 – Aug 2024

-   Assisted students with financial aid questions and applications\
-   Explained deadlines, eligibility, and procedures clearly\
-   Processed confidential records following FERPA guidelines\
-   Supported office tasks like data entry and filing

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Arcade Associate

**Round 1 – City of Industry, CA**\
June 2022 – March 2023

-   Handled POS transactions and register balancing\
-   Maintained organization and cleanliness of arcade space\
-   Provided customer service in a fast-paced environment

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Skills

-   Social Media Content Creation\
-   Customer Relationship Management\
-   Basic Marketing & Branding\
-   Time Management & Multitasking

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Technical Skills

-   Microsoft Excel (Basic)\
-   Canva\
-   Google Docs & Sheets\
-   POS Systems

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Additional Information

**Certification:** Certified Barista\
**Languages:** English & Spanish

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Social Media

TikTok: @vianeyy.v
